qa_pairs.task_instruction: The floor needs sweeping. Where can I find the broom and dustpan leaning against the cupboard?
I want to do some weight training. Where is the black adjustable dumbbell sitting on the floor near the brown chair?
I need to time my work session. Where is the square timer sitting on the white desk?
I need to fold a beige top. Where is the person holding up the beige sweater to inspect it?
I need a red and white checkered cloth. Which item is being held up by two hands?
I need a yellow strap. Where is someone holding the yellow strap attached to the drying rack?
I need to store the drying rack away. Where is it fully collapsed and leaning against the wall?
I need to put folded clothes away in the closet. Where is the fabric hanging organizer with shelves?
